Audrey Hall.age_range: teenager — confirmed not yet eighteen at time of chapter
Audrey Hall.hair_style: long blond hair coiled up in an elegant bun
Audrey Hall.primary_clothing: collared, high-waisted, pale-white dress with engageantes, tight corset, voluminous cage crinoline; white-silk gloves; white dancing shoes with roses and diamonds.
Audrey Hall.face_description: delicate and youthful features, a soft jawline, and large expressive eyes
Audrey Hall.visual_anchor: Teenage blonde girl with a poised 'Spectator' gaze and hair in an elegant bun, wearing a pale-white high-waisted Victorian crinoline gown with white-silk gloves and sparkling diamond jewelry.
Audrey Hall.distinguishing_features: Eyes look like they have two souls spiraling slowly in them; pure and serene aura like a clear lake.
Audrey Hall.accessories: sparkling diamond earrings, necklace, and rings; white-silk gloves; glass of clear champagne
Audrey Hall.faction: Tarot Club (Justice); noble class resident of Backlund, Empress Borough
Audrey Hall.source_notes: Described as she is summoned to the gray fog.
Audrey Hall.era_clothing_lock: collared high-waisted pale-white Victorian dress with lace engageantes, tight corset, voluminous cage crinoline, white-silk gloves, white dancing shoes with rose and diamond stitching

Lady of Crimson.primary_clothing: Flowing dark red and silver Victorian-style divine robes, velvet textures
Lady of Crimson.face_description: Ethereal and detached face, almond-shaped crimson eyes, sharp but graceful features with high cheekbones.
Lady of Crimson.visual_anchor: Ethereal female figure with pale ivory skin, long flowing silver hair, and deep crimson eyes, wearing ornate dark red Victorian divine robes.
Lady of Crimson.distinguishing_features: Associated with the moon and ritualistic incantations
Lady of Crimson.source_notes: Mentioned as an entity to whom ritualistic chants are directed.

Mother of Concealment.unique_identifier: shrouded in layers of deep black veils that seem to absorb all light; pupilless pitch-black eyes visible through the veil
Mother of Concealment.era_clothing_lock: floor-length black silk Victorian gown with high collar and long sleeves, layered black lace veils draped over the entire figure, black gloves, no visible face — only darkness beneath the veil
Mother of Concealment.face_description: Ageless pale face barely visible beneath cascading black veils. Smooth, expressionless features with pupilless black eyes that seem to swallow light.
Mother of Concealment.visual_anchor: Ageless pale divine female figure entirely shrouded in layered floor-length black silk and lace Victorian veils, pupilless black eyes just visible in the darkness beneath, representing concealment itself
Mother of Concealment.color_palette: absolute black, pale ivory, deep shadow grey, midnight blue
Mother of Concealment.primary_clothing: floor-length black silk gown with black lace veils
Mother of Concealment.distinguishing_features: body and face perpetually wrapped in black veils; no light reflects off her garments
Mother of Concealment.source_notes: Named as one of the seven gods alongside Lady of Crimson and Empress of Misfortune and Horror. No physical description given — appearance guessed from domain (concealment) and Victorian-era divine aesthetic.

Empress of Misfortune and Horror.unique_identifier: blood-red eyes that radiate a palpable sense of dread; ashen white wild hair cascading down like a shroud, unbound and tangled
Empress of Misfortune and Horror.era_clothing_lock: tattered deep crimson and black Victorian court gown with torn lace trim, frayed elbow-length black gloves, cracked leather boots barely visible beneath the gown's hem
Empress of Misfortune and Horror.face_description: Gaunt pale-grey oval face with sharp, skeletal cheekbones and a thin-lipped mouth set in a permanent grimace. Blood-red irises with no visible whites, framed by dark hollowed eye sockets.
Empress of Misfortune and Horror.visual_anchor: Ageless gaunt grey-skinned divine female with wild ashen white unbound hair and blood-red eyes radiating dread, wearing a tattered deep crimson and black Victorian court gown with frayed black lace
Empress of Misfortune and Horror.color_palette: deep crimson, ashen white, bone grey, absolute black
Empress of Misfortune and Horror.primary_clothing: tattered crimson and black Victorian court gown
Empress of Misfortune and Horror.distinguishing_features: blood-red eyes, wild unbound ashen hair, permanent aura of dread
Empress of Misfortune and Horror.accessories: frayed black lace trim, cracked black leather gloves
Empress of Misfortune and Horror.source_notes: Named as one of the seven gods. Domain is misfortune and horror. No physical description in text — appearance entirely guessed from her divine domain and Victorian-era aesthetic.

The Fool.face_description: features hidden by mysterious gray fog
The Fool.visual_anchor: A mysterious male figure shrouded entirely in gray fog, acting as the initiator of the secret Gathering.
The Fool.distinguishing_features: seated at the Seat of Honor at the head of the bronze table in the gray fog palace; identity is Zhou Mingrui (Klein Moretti's body)
The Fool.source_notes: Described from the picture in the notebook.

Glaint.unique_identifier: always carries a leather-bound grimoire under one arm; small round wire-framed spectacles perched on a narrow nose
Glaint.era_clothing_lock: dark navy wool frock coat with brass buttons, ivory cravat secured with a plain silver pin, charcoal wool trousers, black leather Oxford shoes, thin black leather gloves
Glaint.face_description: Narrow oval face with a high forehead, sharp thin nose, and arched brows giving a perpetually alert expression. Pale, slightly sunken cheeks suggesting a bookish indoor lifestyle.
Glaint.visual_anchor: Mid-40s fair-skinned male with narrow oval face, wire-framed spectacles, and a leather-bound grimoire tucked under his arm, wearing a dark navy Victorian frock coat with ivory cravat
Glaint.color_palette: dark navy, ivory, charcoal grey, brass gold
Glaint.source_notes: Mentioned by Audrey as someone who warned about dangerous godlike entities in private noble mysticism gatherings. No physical description given — all appearance details guessed consistent with a Victorian-era noble occult scholar.

Alger Wilson.primary_clothing: robe with lightning patterns embroidered on it
Alger Wilson.visual_anchor: early 30s male, weathered skin, dark messy hair, wearing a robe embroidered with lightning patterns, holding a quirky-shaped glass bottle
Alger Wilson.color_palette: deep sea blue, silver, dark grey
Alger Wilson.distinguishing_features: Much purer aura, suspected of advancing; pathway related to Sailor/Keeper of the Sea/Storm.
Alger Wilson.source_notes: Placed a pocket watch next to his brass sextant in the captain's cabin; aura observed by Klein.
Alger Wilson.era_clothing_lock: robe embroidered with lightning patterns, worn aboard a three-masted sailboat at sea

Primordial Demoness.unique_identifier: extremely long violet-black hair that trails along the floor like a living shadow; deep violet eyes with a vertical slit pupil
Primordial Demoness.era_clothing_lock: floor-length deep purple Victorian gown with a black velvet bodice, puffed sleeves of sheer dark silk, elbow-length black gloves, no footwear visible beneath the gown
Primordial Demoness.face_description: Ageless, flawless pale face of unsettling symmetry with high arched brows, sharp angular cheekbones, and full lips the colour of bruised violet. Vertical slit pupils in deep violet irises.
Primordial Demoness.visual_anchor: Ancient ageless pale female entity with violet-slit eyes and floor-length violet-black hair trailing like shadow, wearing a floor-length deep purple Victorian gown with black velvet bodice and sheer dark silk sleeves
Primordial Demoness.color_palette: deep violet, violet-black, pale ivory, shadow black
Primordial Demoness.primary_clothing: deep purple Victorian gown with black velvet bodice
Primordial Demoness.distinguishing_features: slit-pupil violet eyes, hair that trails the floor like a living shadow
Primordial Demoness.source_notes: Mentioned by Alger as a possible true identity of The Fool — an ancient primordial entity. No physical description given; appearance guessed from name and context as a primordial being predating the current gods.

Hidden Sage.unique_identifier: pale gold eyes that glow faintly in low light; always partially hidden behind a hooded grey cloak, face perpetually in partial shadow
Hidden Sage.era_clothing_lock: deep grey wool hooded cloak over a plain black Victorian frock coat, unadorned black waistcoat, dark charcoal trousers, worn black leather boots, no gloves
Hidden Sage.face_description: Ancient, weathered parchment-pale face with deep-set pale gold eyes and a long straight nose. Thin lips framed by sharp angular cheekbones and a narrow jaw, giving an air of cold detached intellect.
Hidden Sage.visual_anchor: Ancient ageless pale-skinned male figure with faintly glowing pale gold eyes and white hair, perpetually half-hidden beneath a deep grey hooded Victorian cloak over a plain black frock coat
Hidden Sage.color_palette: deep grey, pale gold, parchment white, black
Hidden Sage.primary_clothing: deep grey hooded cloak over black frock coat
Hidden Sage.distinguishing_features: faintly glowing pale gold eyes, perpetually hooded
Hidden Sage.accessories: deep grey wool hood always raised
Hidden Sage.source_notes: Mentioned by Alger as a possible true identity of The Fool — an ancient hidden entity. No physical description given; appearance guessed from name (hidden, sage) and context as an ancient concealed being of great wisdom.

The Creator.primary_clothing: none, body composed of land and stars
The Creator.face_description: A cosmic visage where one eye is a burning sun and the other a blood-red moon, framed by the void of space.
The Creator.visual_anchor: Eternal cosmic being, one eye is the sun and the other is the crimson moon, body merging into the land and stars
The Creator.color_palette: golden yellow, crimson red, deep space black, starlight white
The Creator.distinguishing_features: Eyes are celestial bodies; body is the universe itself
The Creator.source_notes: Mentioned in the creation myth; physical description based on the myth's details.

Klein Moretti.face_description: average-looking features with a rather deep outline; distinct scholarly air; temples show grotesque wound with burn marks in chapter opening scene
Klein Moretti.visual_anchor: early 20s pale male with a scholarly bearing, wearing a halved black top hat and a black Victorian frock coat, frequently using a topaz spirit pendulum on a silver chain
Klein Moretti.distinguishing_features: graduated from Khoy University; commoner background; four black dots forming a square appeared briefly on the back of his hand after the ritual
Klein Moretti.accessories: silver pocket watch patterned with vine-leaves
Klein Moretti.source_notes: Klein mentally notes that he recently advanced and has yet to completely digest the Seer potion.
Klein Moretti.era_clothing_lock: black Victorian frock coat, halved black top hat, starched white shirt, scholarly bearing
Klein Moretti.unique_identifier: always wears a black top hat split in half (halved top hat) and carries a silver chain with a pure topaz pendulum in his left sleeve

Justice.face_description: elegant and refined features hidden by fog
Justice.visual_anchor: A slender young woman in an elegant Victorian dress, shrouded in gray fog during the Gathering.
Justice.distinguishing_features: The back of her chair above the gray fog features an illusory constellation forming the symbol of a 'Giant Dragon'.
Justice.source_notes: Klein observed the symbol after she became a Beyonder.

The Hanged Man.face_description: rugged and weathered face hidden by fog
The Hanged Man.visual_anchor: A tall, rugged man in nautical Victorian attire, sitting within the mysterious gray fog.
The Hanged Man.distinguishing_features: The back of his chair above the gray fog features a constellation forming the symbol of 'Storm'.
The Hanged Man.source_notes: Klein recognized the symbol on his chair.

Antigonus.unique_identifier: surrounded by faint spider-like ethereal threads
Antigonus.era_clothing_lock: tattered black Victorian frock coat over an open white shirt, dark formal trousers, bare feet
Antigonus.face_description: partially hidden behind a thick beard and unkempt hair, visible sharp intense eyes
Antigonus.visual_anchor: tall lean pale male surrounded by faint spider-like ethereal threads, wearing a tattered black Victorian frock coat over an open white shirt
Antigonus.color_palette: black, dark grey, pale white, shadow
Antigonus.source_notes: Mentioned as an illustrious name and family of the Fourth Epoch; appearance guessed.

Susie.face_description: Friendly and remarkably intelligent golden retriever face, featuring a soft muzzle and expressive, bright eyes.
Susie.visual_anchor: Intelligent golden retriever dog with lustrous golden fur and bright brown eyes, often sitting with an air of capable assistance.
Susie.color_palette: golden yellow, warm brown, creamy white
Susie.source_notes: Referred to explicitly as a golden retriever.

Roselle Gustav.face_description: handsome and charismatic face with an air of authority
Roselle Gustav.visual_anchor: middle-aged male, elaborate emperor attire, charismatic and authoritative presence
Roselle Gustav.color_palette: imperial red, gold, white, navy blue
Roselle Gustav.distinguishing_features: Captain of the Black King, known as the Son of the Steam.
Roselle Gustav.source_notes: Diary reveals he was born in Intis Kingdom, sailed the Black King, chose the Savant pathway, and was called Son of the Steam.
